name: New Hire Onboarding Program
description: 4-week structured onboarding for new sales reps covering discovery, objection handling, negotiation, and closing skills.

scenarios.name: Basic Discovery Call
scenarios.persona: Friendly mid-market prospect, open to sharing information but needs guidance on next steps.

scenarios.name: Uncovering Hidden Pain
scenarios.persona: Guarded enterprise prospect who minimizes problems initially but has significant unmet needs.

scenarios.name: Price Objection
scenarios.persona: Budget-conscious prospect who likes the product but pushes back hard on pricing.

scenarios.name: Competitor Comparison
scenarios.persona: Prospect actively evaluating CompetitorAlpha and asking pointed comparison questions.

scenarios.name: Multi-stakeholder Negotiation
scenarios.persona: CFO and VP Sales with different priorities - CFO wants discount, VP wants features.

scenarios.name: Contract Terms Push-back
scenarios.persona: Legal counsel requesting non-standard contract modifications.

scenarios.name: Stalled Deal Revival
scenarios.persona: Champion who went dark after internal reorg. Deal at risk.

scenarios.name: Executive Close
scenarios.persona: C-level executive with 15 minutes who needs compelling reason to approve purchase.
